items.title: Below-par West Ham edge past Burton in FA Cup after extra-time
items.summary: Crysencio Summerville spared West Ham’s blushes as he came off the bench to score an extra-time winner against League One Burton and put Nuno Espirito Santos’ side into the FA Cup last 16 with a 1-0 victory.

items.title: Summerville strike earns 10-man West Ham extra-time FA Cup win at Burton
items.summary: For West Ham’s second string, barring a shock defeat this could barely have been a more uncomfortable afternoon. With the captain Jarrod Bowen among a clutch of regulars given a breather, it was Crysencio Summerville, a late substitute Nuno Espírito Santo would have rather kept fresh, who spared embarrassment at Burton Albion and helped them into the FA Cup fifth round. Four years ago at Kidderminster, in this competition, it was Declan Rice who entered to save their skin and it was a similar story here, Summerville’s extra-time strike preventing penalties. West Ham squeezed through, Freddie Potts’s red card 11 minutes into extra time for crunching into the Burton substitute Julian Larsson ensuring a nervy finale, in which another sub Kain Adom skittled a stoppage-time shot against the side netting. For Gary Bowyer, Burton’s colourful head coach who was wearing boxing gloves when he greeted his squad in the dressing room, a nod to a theme adopted through this Cup run, they almost landed a knockout blow. Continue reading...

items.title: VI Live: Kane met dubbelslag bij Bayern, Hartman speelt bij Burnley
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er vier Eredivisie-duels op het programma. Voor Ajax tegen Fortuna Sittard is er een apart liveblog, voor de rest kun je terecht in deze VI Live. En uiteraard ook voor het belangrijkste voetbal in het buitenland.

items.title: Dick Voormekaar Podcast Extra: 'Sterling laat Feyenoord zweven op roze wolk'
items.summary: In deze exclusieve aflevering van de Dick Voormekaar Podcast wordt de spectaculaire transfer van Raheem Sterling naar Feyenoord uitgebreid besproken. Clubwatcher Martijn Krabbendam gaat in op de komst van de voormalig speler van Liverpool, Manchester City, Chelsea en Arsenal naar De Kuip. Ook wordt alvast vooruitgeblikt op Feyenoord - Go Ahead Eagles én het aanstaande debuut van keeper Steven Benda.

items.title: Tottenham appoint Igor Tudor as new head coach
items.summary: Tottenham Hotspur have appointed Igor Tudor as their new head coach, the club have confirmed.

items.title: Wrexham into FA Cup last 16 for 1st time since '97
items.summary: Wrexham achieved another landmark moment in their meteoric rise after reaching the last 16 of England's FA Cup for the first time since 1997.

items.title: PSG stunned by coachless Rennes in title blow
items.summary: Coachless Rennes stunned Ligue 1 leaders Paris Saint-Germain 3-1 at home and snapped a five-game winless run on Friday.

items.title: Pulisic comes off bench as Modric gives Milan win
items.summary: Luka Modric scored a late winner for AC Milan to beat Pisa 2-1 and close the gap on Serie A leader Inter Milan to five points on Friday.

items.title: Hull confirm arrests over chanting vs. Chelsea
items.summary: Hull City have confirmed there were multiple arrests made for discriminatory chanting during Friday's 4-0 FA Cup fourth round defeat to Chelsea.

items.title: Summerville met knappe solo in verlenging de bekerheld van West Ham
items.summary: West Ham United is zaterdagmiddag ontsnapt aan een bekerblamage op bezoek bij Burton Albion. De club uit de League One hield lang stand en sleepte er een verlenging uit, invaller Crysencio Summerville had echter kort nodig om Burton over de knie te leggen.

items.title: Barça komt in actie na tirade van Frenkie de Jong over de VAR
items.summary: Barcelona heeft een formele klachtenbrief gestuurd aan de Spaanse bond (RFEF), geadresseerd aan de president, de scheidsrechtersbaas, de baas van de VAR en de directeur juridische zaken. De timing na het verloren bekerduel met Atlético Madrid doet vermoeden dat Barça in actie is gekomen na een afgekeurde goal van Pau Cubarsí waar teamgenoot Frenkie de Jong ook al flink over klaagde.

items.title: Final Score
items.summary: Jason Mohammad and guests bring you all the goals, analysis, reaction and interviews.

items.title: Van der Sar hoopt dat Jordi Cruijff voor rust zorgt: 'Daar snakt Ajax naar'
items.summary: Edwin van der Sar kijkt met gemengde gevoelens terug op zijn vertrek bij Ajax. De voormalig algemeen directeur vindt dat hij op een rommelige manier is weggegaan, maar benadrukt dat zijn liefde voor de club altijd zal blijven.

items.title: Preston, Blackburn lead; Millwall, Derby & Sheff Utd in action - EFL LIVE!
Hull storms to season-opening win after tense Riyadh finish
items.summary: Charley Hull won the season-opening Ladies European Tour event with a one-shot victory at the LET's PIF Saudi Ladies International in Riyadh after an impressive final-round 65.

items.title: ‘It is an honour’: Tottenham confirm Igor Tudor as interim head coach until end of season
items.summary: Former Juventus head coach replaces Thomas Frank Croatian’s priority to ‘improve our results quickly’ Igor Tudor has been announced as Tottenham’s interim head coach on a deal until the end of the season. Spurs dismissed Thomas Frank on Wednesday after a dismal display in a 2-1 defeat at home to Newcastle a day earlier left the club in 16th position and only five points above the Premier League relegation zone. Continue reading...

items.title: Winter Olympics Explained: Who is Benoit Richaud and why does he have 13 jackets?!
items.summary: Sky Sports' Geraint Hughes explains why figure skating coach Benoit Richaud changes his jacket after each of his 16 skaters from 13 different countries performs!

items.title: Guimaraes set to be out for two months with injury
items.summary: Newcastle United captain Bruno Guimaraes is expected to be out for a couple of months after sustaining a hamstring injury.

items.title: 'It meant everything to me!' | Weston elated with taking gold in skeleton
items.summary: Matt Weston reacts to winning gold in the skeleton and securing Team GB's first gold medal of the Winter Olympics.
